summary: Type definitions and interfaces: MessageSummarizeResult, SummarizeQueueResult, Client interface, ChatRequest, ChatMessage
notes: Matches hint: summarizer.go defines interfaces and types (ChatRequest, ChatMessage, MessageSummarizeResult, SummarizeQueueResult) — the contract. MessageSummarizeResult: returned by Service.SummarizeMessage with Summary text, Model name, Skipped flag. SummarizeQueueResult: returned by Service.SummarizeUnsummarized/ForChannels with counters (Total, Processed, Skipped, APIErrors) and LastError. Client interface: ChatCompletion(context, ChatRequest) → (string, error) — implemented by OllamaClient and OpenRouterClient. Pure type definitions, no logic or side effects.
